terroir.paragraph1: Each product is sourced directly from its region of origin and selected at its peak quality.
terroir.paragraph2: Every item is carefully packaged in protective, travel-ready materials, ensuring it reaches you safely while preserving its natural freshness and authenticity.

products.sourcedWithCare: Sourced with care, crafted for excellence.
products.comingSoonDesc: We are carefully crafting this section to ensure the same level of excellence as our products. Please check back later.

about.heroDesc: ZABRA is a Moroccan brand rooted in the three richest landscapes of the Kingdom — a bridge between ancestral traditions and your modern lifestyle.
about.introTitle: A legacy woven from three of Morocco's most extraordinary landscapes
about.introDesc: Our identity is shaped by a unique family heritage: inspired by the ancestral palm groves of Errachidia, the golden argan forests of the Souss, and the fertile olive orchards of Beni Mellal. This deep connection to the land ensures that every product we offer carries the authentic soul of its terroir.
about.terroir1Desc: Our extra virgin olive oil comes from the fertile orchards of Beni Mellal, a region long celebrated for the richness of its olive groves. Grown under the sun of the Atlas foothills and nurtured by generations of farmers, this oil expresses the pure character of Moroccan olive terroir.
about.terroir2Desc: The "Gold of Morocco" — our argan oil is extracted from ancestral argan trees in a UNESCO-protected biosphere reserve. Available in both cosmetic and culinary forms for skin, hair, and kitchen.
about.terroir3Desc: Naturally caramelized Medjool dates, hand-selected from the ancestral palm groves of the Ziz Valley. Each date is individually inspected for generous size, intact skin, and naturally soft flesh.
about.valuesDesc: Every ZABRA product is a bridge between Moroccan traditions and your modern lifestyle.
about.value1Desc: Every product is sourced directly from its region of origin, preserving the authentic identity and climate of its home.
about.value2Desc: We don't mass-produce — we select. Each extraction is personally supervised and each product hand-inspected.
about.value3Desc: From second-season harvests to cold-pressed extraction, every step is designed to deliver excellence.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heroDesc: Have a question, want to place a bulk order, or simply want to learn more about ZABRA? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill in the form below and we'll respond promptly.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.tellUs: Tell us how we can help...
contact.sentDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

cart.emptyDesc: Browse our premium products and add them to your cart to place an order.
cart.orderNote: Your order details will be sent to our WhatsApp for confirmation and payment instructions.
